title: harness-kit project config (.harness/config.json)
description: Per-project, git-tracked configuration that makes the bundled harness scripts project-agnostic. Every project literal (file globs, verify commands, layering rules, thresholds) lives here, never in plugin code. Normally edited by Claude Code on the user's behalf — see docs/configuration.md for an AI-oriented guide with annotated examples and recipes.

projectType.description: Preset identity. Only affects the init scaffolder and advisor copy; the bundled scripts never branch on it.

language.description: Project language preference. Harness Kit uses it for AI-facing guidance and generated document content. File/directory names, command names, and config keys stay untranslated.

verificationMode.description: Stop-gate strictness. strict => a failed gate blocks premature completion (exit 2); advisory => warn only. Overrides the plugin-level userConfig default.

verifyCmd.description: Canonical verify entrypoint, shared by the Stop hook, the git pre-commit hook, and /harness-kit:verify. Defaults to the bundled harness-verify orchestrator that runs gates[].

buildCmd.description: Build/compile command, surfaced by the advisor/checklist.

gates.description: Ordered verification gates run by harness-verify (the Stop gate, pre-commit, and /harness-kit:verify all go through it). Each runs as a shell command; a blocking failure fails the aggregate.

command.description: Shell command to run. Bundled gate commands (harness-check-layering, harness-doc-links, harness-doc-gardening, harness-check-plan-dod) resolve via the plugin bin dir, which harness-verify prepends to PATH. Custom gates are any shell command.

blocking.description: true = a failure fails the whole verify run. false = soft gate: warns but does not fail the aggregate.

skipWhenProcess.description: Optional. Skip this gate while a process matching this name is running (e.g. 'Godot' to avoid the editor project lock during a headless compile).

tier.description: Effort-routing tier. Only relevant when effortRouting.enabled: on low/medium-effort turns only 'fast' gates run (others are logged as skipped). When routing is off (default), tier is ignored and all gates run.

layeringRules.description: Dependency-direction constraints checked by harness-check-layering. Each rule forbids a regex from appearing in files under a glob — i.e. an illegal import/reference across architecture layers.

forbidden.description: Regex that must NOT appear in files under scope (an illegal dependency).

message.description: Remediation text shown when the rule is violated.
examples: UI must not hit the DB directly; go via an API/service

plan.description: Plan lifecycle convention. Drives the plan gate (auto-scaffold a plan before editing covered code), plan archival on approval, the plan-DoD gate, and advisor counts.

dir.description: Plan root; active/ and completed/ live under it.

codeGlob.description: Regex of file paths whose edits require a covering plan. Empty string disables the plan gate.

template.description: Path to the plan scaffold template (relative to plugin templates or the project). Defaults to the bundled plan-template.md.

statusField.description: Field label parsed from a plan's frontmatter/header to read its lifecycle status.

completedValue.description: The status value that means a plan is done and must live in completed/.

checklistRegex.description: Regex matching an unchecked Definition-of-Done item.

requiredFields.description: Field labels every completed plan must contain (template-compliance check in doc-gardening).

docs.description: Doc-related paths. Feed the session handoff (keyDocs), the dead-link scanner (scanRoots), and doc-gardening (architecture/quality/staleness/naming/drift).

keyDocs.description: Docs surfaced in the session-start handoff so Claude reads them before related work.

scanRoots.description: Dirs scanned recursively for dead links (top-level *.md is always scanned).

architecturePath.description: Architecture doc audited for drift by doc-gardening.

qualityPath.description: Quality/score doc audited for staleness by doc-gardening.

stalenessDays.description: Staleness threshold (days) for the qualityPath newest-date check.

placeholderPatterns.description: Substrings that mark unfinished placeholder docs. Sensible English+CN defaults if omitted.

layerPathRegex.description: Regex extracting referenced layer paths from architecturePath; doc-gardening flags any that no longer exist on disk (forward drift).

layerBaseDir.description: Base dir whose immediate subdirectories are the architecture layers; doc-gardening flags any real subdir NOT declared in architecturePath (reverse drift).

layerIgnoreDirs.description: Subdirectory names under layerBaseDir exempt from the reverse-drift check.

namingGlob.description: Glob of files whose names are checked against namingDisallow.

namingDisallow.description: Regex on the basename-without-extension that must NOT match.

metrics.description: Counted by harness-advisor for its dashboard. Each metric is a glob whose match count is the metric value.

name.description: Metric identifier shown on the advisor dashboard.

glob.description: Glob whose match count is the metric value.

exclude.description: Optional regex; matching files are excluded from the count.

enabledCapabilities.description: On/off switches for harness behaviors. Absent keys default ON for stable capabilities, OFF for experimental ones. The trace-driven suggester (harness-trace-analyze) recommends toggles; the user decides.

planGate.description: Auto-scaffold a plan when editing un-planned code (PreToolUse on Edit/Write).

toolTrace.description: Record tool-call/failure metadata for trace analysis.

evaluator.description: RECOMMEND the evaluator at the Stop gate when code changed (a nudge — does NOT auto-run it; see evaluator.enabled to actually run it).

contextSnapshot.description: Snapshot harness state before compaction and re-inject it afterward.

evaluatorAutoDispatch.description: EXPERIMENTAL: auto-run the evaluator subagent via a type:agent Stop hook (non-blocking, context-only). Off by default; also requires wiring hooks/optional-auto-eval.json.

effortRouting.description: Reasoning-budget routing. When enabled, low/medium-effort turns run only 'fast'-tier gates (skips are logged). Default OFF so verification is never silently weakened by a low-effort turn.

enabled.description: Off = always run all gates regardless of effort (safe default). On = route by $CLAUDE_EFFORT.

phases.description: DEPRECATED — the maturity-phase auto-router was removed. harness-advisor ignores this key. Use enabledCapabilities{} instead; run harness-maintenance to migrate.

loopDetection.description: Tuning for the per-file edit-loop nudge (independent of the enabledCapabilities.loopDetection on/off switch).

threshold.description: Warn after this many edits to one file in a session.

ignoreGlobs.description: File globs excluded from loop counting (generated files, lockfiles).

evaluator.description: Generator/Evaluator separation, run as the final Stop-gate stage. Distinct from enabledCapabilities.evaluator (which only recommends): set enabled=true here to actually run the skeptical evaluator.

enabled.description: Run the skeptical evaluator as the last Stop-hook stage when code matching plan.codeGlob changed.

mode.description: strict => a sub-threshold rubric score blocks completion; advisory => report the score only.

verificationRecipe.description: Maps each rubric dimension to the verification command / MCP tool that checks it. Consumed by the evaluator agent. Keeps MCP tool names (e.g. play_scene, get_game_screenshot) out of plugin code.
